mechanism: Potent inhibition of ABL (including BCR-ABL) and FLT3-ITD signaling to block AML cell proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; strong activity reported in MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits RAF, VEGFR/PDGFR and FLT3-ITD signaling to suppress AML cell growth
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/HCC; active against FLT3-ITD AML lines including MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Blocks multiple receptor tyrosine kinases including FLT3 to reduce oncogenic signaling
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; active in FLT3-ITD AML lines including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits MET/VEGFR and FLT3 signaling pathways to impair AML proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/thyroid cancer; activity in MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Targets multiple kinases including FLT3 to inhibit survival signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CRC/GIST/HCC; active in MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits angiogenic kinases and exhibits some FLT3 inhibition
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/STS; reported activity in MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits SRC/ABL kinases with partial FLT3 inhibition, reducing downstream signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; activity in MOLM-13 may be context-dependent

mechanism: Inhibits BCR-ABL and KIT; weaker activity on FLT3
additional_notes: Approved for CML; less potent on FLT3 in AML

mechanism: Inhibits ribosomal elongation to block protein synthesis and induce apoptosis
additional_notes: Also known as homoharringtonine; approved for CML; active in MOLM-13

mechanism: Reversible inhibition of the 26S proteasome leading to accumulation of misfolded proteins and apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for MM/MCL; active in MOLM-13

mechanism: Irreversible epoxyketone inhibitor of the 20S proteasome causing proteotoxic stress and cell death
additional_notes: Approved for MM; active in MOLM-13

mechanism: Blocks exportin-1 (XPO1)-mediated nuclear export to restore tumor suppressor function
additional_notes: Approved for MM; active in MOLM-13

mechanism: Covalent inhibition of BTK with additional off-target kinase inhibition, impairing survival signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CLL/MCL; activity in MOLM-13 is variable

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial translation, impairing oxidative phosphorylation in AML cells
additional_notes: Repurposed antibiotic; activity reported in MOLM-13

mechanism: Uncouples oxidative phosphorylation and inhibits Wnt signaling
additional_notes: Repurposed anthelmintic; OXPHOS/Wnt pathway effects in AML including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, increasing oxidative stress and inducing apoptosis
additional_notes: Repurposed anti-rheumatic; active in MOLM-13

mechanism: Disrupts lysosomal function and Wnt signaling; redox cycling affects cellular homeostasis
additional_notes: Repurposed anti-leprosy agent; activity reported in AML lines including MOLM-13

mechanism: Induces lysosomal disruption and autophagy inhibition leading to AML cell death
additional_notes: Repurposed antimalarial; active in MOLM-13

mechanism: Generates reactive oxygen species via iron-dependent activation, inducing cytotoxicity
additional_notes: Dihydroartemisinin (active metabolite) reported similarly active; tested in MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits STAT5 signaling; also antagonizes dopamine D2 receptors
additional_notes: Repurposed antipsychotic; thioridazine shows similar activity (~5–15 µM) in AML
